title: Healthy Basket
description: A curated healthy essentials basket that makes members feel rewarded for better choices. Great for wellness campaigns and seasonal resets.

title: Snack Box
description: A fun redemption that feels like opening a gift. Use it to encourage add-on purchases and increase basket size.

title: Premium Pantry Item
description: Redeem for a premium staple like olive oil, coffee, or specialty snacks. A smart reward that feels luxurious and practical.

title: Fresh Fruit Bundle
description: A seasonal fruit bundle that supports produce campaigns and repeat trips. Perfect for summer, back-to-school, and holiday seasons.

title: Member Gift Card
description: A small store credit reward that feels flexible and motivating. Great for keeping high-value members engaged.

title: Free Delivery Month
description: A premium perk that increases frequency and reduces churn. Ideal for turning occasional shoppers into weekly shoppers.
